mapper.select: SELECT b.*, e.ename FROM board b LEFT JOIN emp e ON b.emp_num = e.emp_num where b.board_status='Y' ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.category = '공지' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, b.board_num DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT board_seq.nextval FROM dual
insert into board (board_num, category, title, content, created_at, emp_num) values (#{board_num}, #{category},#{title}, #{content}, sysdate, #{emp_num})
mapper.select: select board_num, title, content from board where board_num = #{board_num}
mapper.update: update board set view_cnt = view_cnt + 1 where board_num = #{board_num}
update board set title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = sysdate where board_num = #{board_num}
mapper.delete: UPDATE board SET board_status = 'N' where board_num = #{board_num}
mapper.select:
select b.*, e.ename from board b left join emp e on b.emp_num = e.emp_num where 1=1 and b.board_status='Y'
and b.title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
and e.ename like '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
and ( b.title like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR e.ename like '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY CASE WHEN b.category = '공지' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, b.board_num DESC
